items.title: [正面] A gacha game that actually put a lot of thought in...
items.summary:
A gacha game that actually put a lot of thought into the gameplay and the world of its story.

The Slay the Spire inspiration is more than obvious, but if you're gonna steal, steal from the successful. There is enough of an original spin on the formula here with the 4 character teams and the "gacha+roguelike" formula grants the game a surprising amount of freshness, where as other gacha can become stale quickly. The "Realms"/factions all have special gimmicks that truly change their gameplay (You can use a vampire-like faction that EATS EMBRYOS to power up, for example), as opposed to the tired "this element deals more damage to that one".

The story takes inspiration from eldritch and gothic themes, you definitely see some Lovecraft here and there, but it's quite original otherwise. A mysterious disease that erases people and events not just from reality but from history itself is the main evil (there is a character from ancient rome who laments its complete erasure, interesting for sure).

The characters are quite varied, and even your most "generic" waifu girl has something going really wrong with her (like e.g. her limbs actively dissolving). Each character also provides unique gameplay and putting together a team is much more of a thought exercise than in other games in the genre. Instead of hardcoded synergies, characters influence each other in much more subtle ways, allowing you to try many combinations to see what works for you.

Interesting story, fun gameplay and really cool character designs (which, well it's a gacha, characters' looks are like the most important thing, lol). And they kinda shower you with stuff, ngl.

Really nice overall, regardless if you want to play it seriously or just have something to do at the end of the day.

The only bad thing is the machine translation, but it's not too egregious, I can definitely live with it.
